identity.name: Cloud App — Google Full-Mailbox + Offline Token Replay Risk
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-003. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1114.002. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-003. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1114.002. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CLOUD-003.
UC: Mailbox Takeover via OAuth / TC: Google — App Requests https://mail.google.com/ Plus Long-Lived Token.

techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CLOUD-003 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Pre-flight: confirm google provider supported
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli describe oauth_grant_emulator \
  | jq -e '.eal_targets'
# step-2: Single full-mailbox grant request to Google OAuth endpoint
cat > /tmp/cloud-003.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-003
name: "Cloud App — Google full-mailbox grant"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - accounts.google.com
dry_run: false
tags: [cloud-app, google, oauth, mailbox]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: google
      scope_preset: full_mailbox
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-003.yml --live
# step-3: Microsoft mailbox grant in parallel — cross-provider mailbox-collection pattern
cat > /tmp/cloud-003-ms.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-003
name: "Cloud App — cross-provider mailbox-collection"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.microsoftonline.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: microsoft
      scope_preset: full_mailbox
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-003-ms.yml --live
